name: laycode-monorepo
description: LayCode monorepo — bridge (laycode-cli) 与移动端 App

scripts.bridge: pnpm --filter laycode-cli build && node bridge/dist/cli.js start --foreground
scripts.server: pnpm --filter laycode-cli build && node bridge/dist/cli.js start --foreground
scripts.build: echo '请指定构建目标：build:bridge | build:dev-apk | build:preview-apk | build:prod-apk | build:prod-aab' && exit 1
scripts.build:dev-apk: cd app && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile development
scripts.build:preview-apk: cd app && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.build:prod-apk: cd app && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production-apk
scripts.build:prod-aab: cd app && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production-aab
scripts.release:apk: gh workflow run build-release.yml --ref main -f profile=production-apk
scripts.release:aab: gh workflow run build-release.yml --ref main -f profile=production-aab
scripts.release:preview: gh workflow run build-release.yml --ref main -f profile=preview
